content.summary: Creates a line primitive between two points.

examples.label: Create a vertical line
examples.code:
l = op('line1')
l.par.dirx = 0
l.par.diry = 1
l.par.dirz = 0
l.par.length = 2

examples.label: Subdivide line for deformation
examples.description: Add 50 points so the line can be deformed by a noise SOP.

examples.label: Set origin position
examples.description: Move the starting point of the line.
